# Obsidian OS v2.4 Release Notes

The new version of Obsidian OS (v2.4) introduces architectural enhancements to the Canonical Truth Layer. 

## Key Updates
*   **Performance:** AST compilation latency has been reduced by 14% on bare-metal deployments.
*   **Security:** Added support for local hardware enclaves in the Root Trust Manager.

As always, Obsidian OS remains an entirely local-first, zero-trust system. We do not transmit telemetry to external servers, ensuring absolute sovereign authority for our enterprise partners.

Deployment documentation has been updated in the Partner Portal.
